description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named facebook/redex/build_main that runs on every pull request to main and stable branches, on push to main, and on a scheduled cron job. The workflow uses a 4-core-ubuntu runner to build Redex for various environments including Ubuntu 20.04, Debian oldoldstable, stable, unstable, and Windows, with some jobs using clang from llvm.org. Some jobs are conditional on the event type.
